'''Bol Chatak''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Zabrak/Legends|Zabrak]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] who served the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] and the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] as a [[Jedi General/Legends|General]] in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. The master of [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] [[Olee Starstone]], she was killed by [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] in the days following the execution of [[Contingency Orders for the Grand Army of the Republic: Order Initiation, Orders 1 Through 150|Contingency]] [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]], a command which destroyed the Order.

==Biography==
Born on [[Iridonia/Legends|Iridonia]], Bol Chatak was discovered to be [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] and was turned over to the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] for [[Jedi training/Legends|education]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]]. Constructing a blue-bladed [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] and completing her [[Jedi Trials/Legends|Trials of Knighthood]], Bol Chatak was elevated to the rank of [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]]. Developing her skills with a lightsaber and enhancing her knowledge of the Force, after many years of study, Jedi Chatak achieved the rank of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]].<ref name="DL" />

On a mission for the [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi High Council]] during the [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|Separatist Crisis]], Master Chatak found herself introduced to [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] [[Olee Starstone]], the aspiring young apprentice of [[Chief Librarian/Legends|Chief Librarian]] of the [[Jedi Archives/Legends|Temple Archives]], [[Jocasta Nu/Legends|Jocasta Nu]]. While the two parted, their first meeting left a lasting impression. When the crisis between the Republic and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] escalated into the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], Master Chatak took up the rank of [[Jedi General/Legends|General]] in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] and began leading [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] on fronts across [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. As the war machine drummed on, the High Council wished to step up the training of several senior Padawans stationed at the Temple. Because of Chatak and Starstone's good relations, the [[Council of Reassignment/Legends|Council of Reassignment]] tasked Chatak with the training of Starstone, pulling the girl from her studies in the Archives and forcing her into the role of [[Jedi Commander/Legends|Commander]] in the Grand Army.<ref name="DL" />

In the [[19 BBY/Legends|third year]] of war, Chatak was dispatched to the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] world of [[Murkhana/Legends|Murkhana]] and was tasked with leading the defense of the planet from the [[Separatist Droid Army/Legends|Separatist Droid Army]]. Aided by Master [[Roan Shryne]] and [[32nd Air Combat Wing]], she led the [[Battle of Murkhana (Clone Wars)|campaign]] valiantly, eventually calling in reinforcements. Led by Master [[Saras Loorne]], the additional troops saw the arrival of two Knights and Padawan Starstone. Serving alongside the [[Clone commando/Legends|clone commando]] unit of [[Ion Team]], Chatak, Shryne and Starstone fought live soldiers of the [[Vibroblade Brigade/Legends|Vibroblade Brigade]] as well as droids. As the Jedi reconnoitered a [[Medcenter/Legends|medcenter]], the clones received a message from the [[Office of the Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Office of the Supreme Chancellor]]. All Jedi were to be killed in compliance with [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]]. While [[Clone Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Salvo (clone trooper)|Salvo]] prepared to ambush the Jedi, the commandos of Ion Team distracted their clone brothers enough to allow the Jedi to flee, unwilling to kill the Force-wielders without confirmation of the order.<ref name="DL" />

Going to ground, Chatak and her two companions felt Master Loorne and the other Knights die as the clones turned their weapons on their former generals. Hiding out in the hilly areas surrounding the [[Murkhana City/Legends|Murkhana City]], the trio disguised themselves as [[Koorivar/Legends|Koorivar]] and camped out in an abandoned warehouse near [[Argente Tower/Legends|Argente Tower]]. Regarding their [[Jedi beacon transceiver|beacon transceivers]], the Jedi were bewildered when they discovered the High Council was requesting that all Jedi return to Coruscant. Attempting to get off planet to comply with the High Council's order, the Jedi observed the battle was over and the Republic was victorious. When the droids around them were suddenly powered down, the group was arrested by several clone troopers who believed them to be mercenaries.<ref name="DL" />

Spending four weeks in a crowded holding facility, the Jedi were eventually marched out, along with the other prisoners, onto a red-clay landing field that had been notched into one of the hillsides surrounding the city to see the [[Mission to Murkhana (Great Jedi Purge)|arrival]] of [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]]. Conversing with Commander Salvo, Vader was in the middle of admonishing Ion Team for disobeying a direct order when Master Chatak removed her disguise and leapt up to confront the Sith. Racing at the black armored figure with her blue-bladed lightsaber ablaze, Chatak met Vader's red blade in an intense battle. Landing a blow on his forearm, Chatak fought valiantly until the cyborg [[Cho sun/Legends|removed her weapon arm]] with his blade. Dropping to her knees and letting out a scream, Chatak looked up at the Sith as he raised his lightsaber and [[Sai cha/Legends|decapitated]] her in a sweeping arc.<ref name="DL" />

==Personality and traits==
A tolerant being, Master Bol Chatak was a calm Jedi who became friends with fellow Jedi [[Roan Shryne]] on the battlefields of [[Murkhana/Legends|Murkhana]]. While a caring master to her Padawan Olee Starstone, Chatak allowed Shryne to tease the girl, lightening the mood on several occasions. Together, both she and Shryne questioned the wisdom of [[Grand Master/Legends|Grand Master]] [[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]] and the involvement the Jedi had in the war.<ref name="DL" />

==Powers and abilities==
Bol Chatak was trained in [[Lightsaber combat/Legends|lightsaber combat]] like all Jedi, wielding a blue bladed weapon crafted by her own hand. Her fighting style was described as swift and considerably more graceful than Darth Vader's early applications of his style. Confronting the Sith on Murkhana, she managed to score a blow on his forearm before Vader's sheer brute strength overwhelmed the Zabrak Jedi, resulting in her death.<ref name="DL" />

==Appearances==
